overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious Cyberpunk 2077 penthouse apartment featuring Japanese-inspired minimalist design with shoji screens, warm mood lighting, and panoramic views of a foggy night cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment gallery with glass-walled rooms overlooking city

agents.ego_description: walking along the glass-walled corridor, observing the interior rooms on the right and the night cityscape visible through the windows on the left

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass walls revealing modern furnished rooms with sofas and minimalist decor
panoramic windows showing foggy night cityscape with distant lights
distinctive red illuminated chair visible through the glass at the far end of the gallery
polished white marble flooring with subtle gray veining

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a luxurious gallery with glass-walled rooms on the right and panoramic city views on the left. A distinctive red accent chair is visible in the distance, and the polished marble floor reflects the warm interior lighting mixed with the cool blue tones from the night outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through glass door into main interior corridor

events.description: passing through the glass door from the exterior gallery into the interior corridor with shoji screens

agents.ego_description: moving through the glass doorway into the main interior hall with Japanese-inspired design

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style sliding screens with wooden frames and paper panels lining both walls
large recessed square ceiling panels emitting warm golden light

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the glass gallery into a more enclosed interior space. Traditional shoji screens line the walls, and large square ceiling lights provide warm illumination. The exterior city views are no longer visible as we move deeper into the apartment.

scene_state.functional_zone: long minimalist corridor with Japanese shoji screens and seating

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor between shoji screen walls, passing wooden benches placed symmetrically along the sides

entered.detail: low-profile dark wooden benches with minimalist design placed against the shoji screens
modern metallic elevator doors with red accent lighting at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a lengthy, serene corridor flanked by illuminated shoji screens and occasional wooden benches. The perspective draws the eye toward the elevator doors at the far end, while the warm square ceiling lights create a rhythmic pattern overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic viewing room with large window overlooking foggy garden

events.description: passing through the glass door at the end of the corridor into the panoramic viewing room
turning to face the large window revealing the foggy night exterior with illuminated trees and red accent lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the final room and turning to observe the panoramic view of the foggy night landscape with illuminated trees

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass wall revealing the exterior night scene
sculptural trees with uplighting visible through the fog outside
vertical red LED light strips embedded in the floor providing accent illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the final doorway into a darkened viewing room with dramatic red floor lighting. Turning toward the large panoramic window, the scene reveals a mysterious foggy night exterior with illuminated sculptural trees, creating a stark contrast between the warm interior and the cool, hazy outside world.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open gallery through a series of minimalist interior spaces, ending in a dramatic, dimly lit viewing room. It begins by gliding along a luxurious gallery where polished marble floors reflect a blend of warm interior light and cool blue tones from the panoramic city views on the left. As the camera moves deeper into the apartment, the open vistas vanish and the environment shifts into an enclosed space defined by traditional shoji screens and rhythmic square ceiling lights. The scene then proceeds down a serene, lengthy corridor flanked by illuminated screens and wooden benches before passing through a final doorway. Finally, the camera enters a darkened room with striking red floor lighting and turns toward a large window to reveal a mysterious, foggy night exterior filled with illuminated sculptural trees.
